response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Match: The spoken English dialogue of the Vtuber Koseki Bijou (Biboo) was manually transcribed completely since the reference JSON was empty. 2. Timing & Pacing: Timings were rigorously synchronized to the millisecond to match the pacing and vocal bursts of the speaker. 3. Language & Translation: Since the original language is English, both original text (og) and English translation (en) fields are populated with the transcribed English text.
